sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16225" key="a)skalhrh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσκᾰληρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n16225.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">equilateral,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:132" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">132</biblScope> </bibl> (prob. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀσκαληνές,</foreign> cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκαληνός</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
